channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Broken Glass outside the school, 22nd July
item.description:
There is lots of broken glass, all along the side of St Michael’s School on Wrotham Road Welling DA16 1LS.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wrotham Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hedge needs cutting back to in-line with the pavement on newland road just after the end of the penstock path exit by Alexandra Palace entrance, 22nd July
item.description:
The hedge is covering most of the path…and has become a flytipping zone…hedge needs to be severely cut back and flytipping removed - no flytipping sign might be good too.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 80, Newland Road, Hornsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Thorough cleaning, 22nd July
item.description:
Our street is still filthy. Please send a Cleaning squad over to clean it head to toes. There's an ongoing pests infestation which spread into our building. If you have taken appropriate actions against coop and the CarWash they won't be littering again.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rosina Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tagging in Pennyfather Lane, EN2, 22nd July
item.description:
Tagging.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Gentlemans Row, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Inoffensive up to 2 metres off the ground

item.title: Hedging over spilling the pedestrian gated public footpath…just before the entrance the new river path, 22nd July
item.description:
The hedge needs trimming back…the path is already too narrow as two way electric bike traffic and pedestrians are constantly dodging out the way.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Penstock Path, Hornsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tagging on street sign for Holly Walk, EN2, 22nd July
item.description:
Tagging.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Holly Walk, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Inoffensive up to 2 metres off the ground

item.title: Greenery over growing end of penstock path where it meets Newland Road, 22nd July
item.description:
The hedging needs to be cut back to the edge of the path as it is over growing. Rubbish needs to be cleared out. This is quite a dangerous ending to an already too narrow path after the penstock tunnel…bicycles and electric two wheeled vehicles are either coming off the road onto the path or leaving the path…pedestrians have no space at the best of times.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 80, Newland Road, Hornsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown trees, 22nd July
item.description:
There is a tree which belongs to Pinewood court This backs on to the garden of 406 it is overgrown and damaging the fence, it was cut back by the council 4 years ago but its not been done since and now it is damaging property fencing.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pinecroft, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 22nd July
item.description:
Rubbish (pile of cardboard) has been left next to our building.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Luke Street, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken rope ladder, 22nd July
item.description:
The middle rope ladder is no longer attached to the frame of the structure.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rodney Road, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Building rubble dumped (flytipped) between blocks 7/12 and 13/18 Kinnoull mansions, 22nd July
item.description:
Rubble in alleyway between blocks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rowhill Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, bed frame and rubbish, 22nd July
item.description:
People always leave their rubbish on this spot.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Greenleigh Avenue, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead weeds need clearing, 22nd July
item.description:
Reported weeds growing several weeks back and followed up with a complaint resulting in the weeds being treated with weed killer. Now the footpath and bank needs physical clearance of the dead vegetation which is still causing obstruction and collecting litter. Thank you in advance for dealing with this matter.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Avenue Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Purple dustbin that crew use on collection days has been left at the junction Arundel Close and Rochester Drive, 22nd July
item.description:
Purple dustbin that crew use on collection days has been left at the junction Arundel Close and Rochester Drive - been there for 2 weeks and is filthy
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Arundel Close, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bikes left on pavement,on yellw line and on residents bays, 22nd July
item.description:
Illegaly parked bikes

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11, Basil Street, Chelsea, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Massive dog chod, swarms of flies, 22nd July
item.description:
Dog chod on the footpath, attracting blow flies. Very hazardous to health.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Geldeston Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car idling for more than 20 minutes, 22nd July
item.description:
It is polluting the air where we live. Smell and noise stressful

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Appalachia restaurant dumping rubbish, 22nd July
item.description:
The restaurant at 71 Nile Street constantly dumps commercial rubbish at the opposite end of the street. It is ripped open by foxes and rats. This is daily. They have ample space directly outside their restaurant either for a bin or to have their rubbish

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Provost Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement constantly blocked by bikes, 22nd July
item.description:
Voi bikes constantly blocking pavement on gibbon road. Cannot use as a buggy user.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): New Cross Gate, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead cat, 22nd July
item.description:
There is a dead cat under the back stairs of next flat. It smells very bad. The stairs are locked , so we can't remove it. We don't know the owner of that flat.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shooters Hill Road, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet
